creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This patch has a defect: it fails with STATIC_TOR option on.
configure options --enable-zstd and --enable-lzma need to get their own port option and be handled correctly. I will correct this once I have time.

Since this is a -devel version, you can probably commit the patch as it is now, because STATIC_TOR is supposedly a rarely used option.
